$comment: Skills the hero-mmt-kit workflow references. The `process` core skills are bundled under templates/skills/ and installed by init/update into .claude/skills/. Concise reporting principles are integrated directly into the hero-* workflow skills rather than shipped as a standalone optional skill. Most vendored technique skills are a curated, lightly trimmed MIT-licensed copy from obra/superpowers; the hero-* skills plus security-review are authored by hero-mmt-kit (attribution: templates/skills/NOTICE). Design/taste skills are NOT bundled — they are referenced here and installed via the `skills` CLI from their ORIGINAL sources when the user opts into the taste/design skill.

process.license: MIT for obra/superpowers skills; hero-mmt-kit authored for the hero-* skills and security-review
process.description: Core process skills the workflow invokes by name. Bundled under templates/skills/ and installed into .claude/skills/ by init/update. The hero-* skills are the primary developer-facing interface; they wrap the vendored obra/superpowers technique skills rather than duplicating them (attribution in templates/skills/NOTICE).

selection.installPolicy: install the full bundled process suite unconditionally — every install gets all core skills
selection.updatePolicy: refresh all framework-managed bundled process skills; preserve user-added skill directories

skills.name: using-hero
skills.description: Overview and router for the hero-* skills — explains which skill to invoke next and how session state carries across sessions.

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: OWASP-focused security review for vulnerable surfaces, sensitive data, auth/authz, and AI/LLM risks before completion.

skills.name: hero-planning
skills.description: Turn a request into an agreed, written plan before code changes.

skills.name: hero-coding
skills.description: Implement an approved plan, or a small change that doesn't need one.

skills.name: hero-reviewing
skills.description: Fresh-eyes check of an implementation against its plan, before merge.

skills.name: hero-unit-test
skills.description: Verify implementation correctness — TDD-first or post-implementation.

skills.name: hero-security
skills.description: Dispatch a focused security-review pass when a sensitive surface is touched.

skills.name: hero-strict
skills.description: Opt-in full verification pass before a "done" claim.

brand.description: Brand/identity skill. Use once per product/brand.

design-direction.description: Visual-direction taste systems. Pick EXACTLY ONE per project (DESIGN_STANDARDS §3).

design-tools.description: Complementary design tools — install as needed (not mutually exclusive).
